summary.en: A major woodcut work depicting rural negotiation and social transformation during wartime China.
summary.zh: 这是古元延安时期的重要木刻作品，描绘战时中国乡村社会变迁中的减租场景。

summary.en: A work associated with land reform and the visual documentation of social change in northern China.
summary.zh: 这件作品与土地改革相关，记录了中国北方社会变迁中的重要历史场景。

summary.en: One of Gu Yuan’s significant works from the late 1940s, reflecting collective action and social experience during a period of transition.
summary.zh: 古元20世纪40年代后期的重要作品之一，表现社会转型时期的集体行动与历史经验。

summary.en: A woodcut work reflecting legal, social, and everyday life issues in rural society during the Yan’an period.
summary.zh: 这件木刻作品反映延安时期乡村社会中的法律、家庭与日常生活议题。

summary.en: A work depicting the relationship between soldiers, families, and village communities during wartime.
summary.zh: 作品描绘战时环境中士兵、家庭与乡村社群之间的关系。

summary.en: An early woodcut showing Gu Yuan’s close observation of rural labor and everyday movement.
summary.zh: 早期木刻作品之一，体现古元对乡村劳动与日常生活动态的观察。

summary.en: A work created from Gu Yuan’s rural experience in Nianzhuang, focusing on animals, labor, and village life.
summary.zh: 作品来自古元在碾庄乡的农村经验，关注牲畜、劳动与乡村生活。

summary.en: A rural-life woodcut reflecting Gu Yuan’s interest in everyday scenes and local visual culture.
summary.zh: 这件乡村生活题材木刻体现了古元对日常场景与地方视觉文化的关注。

summary.en: A work connected to rural labor and the everyday rhythms of village life.
summary.zh: 作品与乡村劳动及村庄日常生活节奏相关。

summary.en: A post-1949 work connected to new visual forms and public art in early People’s Republic China.
summary.zh: 这是新中国初期与公共视觉艺术及新年画形式相关的作品。

summary.en: A lyrical work showing Gu Yuan’s interest in landscape, agricultural life, and visual atmosphere.
summary.zh: 这件作品具有抒情特征，体现古元对风景、农业生活与视觉氛围的关注。

summary.en: A representative color woodcut reflecting Gu Yuan’s mature interest in landscape, composition, and poetic visual language.
summary.zh: 这是一件具有代表性的套色木刻，体现古元成熟时期对风景、构图与诗性视觉语言的探索。

title.en: Liu Zhidan and the Red Guards

summary.en: A historical-theme work connected to collective memory and revolutionary-era visual culture.
summary.zh: 这是一件历史题材作品，与集体记忆和革命时期视觉文化相关。

summary.en: A representative work often associated with Gu Yuan’s historical and cultural visual memory.
summary.zh: 这件代表作品常与古元的历史记忆与文化视觉表达联系在一起。

summary.en: A late work dedicated to Gu Yuan’s hometown, reflecting memory, landscape, and return.
summary.zh: 古元晚年献给故乡的重要作品，体现记忆、风景与回归主题。

summary.en: A woodcut portrait based on the literary figure Xianglin Sao, reflecting Gu Yuan’s interest in psychological expression and social realism.
summary.zh: 根据文学人物“祥林嫂”创作的木刻肖像，体现古元对人物心理与现实主义表达的关注。

summary.en: An early expressive portrait study using strong black-and-white contrast and simplified composition.
summary.zh: 早期表现性人物木刻习作，以强烈黑白对比与简化构图形成视觉张力。

title.en: Japanese Agents Forcing Villagers to Join Puppet Army
title.zh: 夺取私人物品参加伪军

summary.zh: 反映战争时期强迫民众参与伪军的早期木刻作品。

summary.zh: 与战争时期民众反抗与冲突相关的木刻作品。

summary.en: A socially engaged woodcut focused on labor, agriculture, and wartime rural life.
summary.zh: 关注劳动、农业与战时乡村生活的社会性木刻作品。

summary.en: A dramatic wartime scene reflecting violence and civilian suffering.

summary.en: A woodcut focusing on survival, labor, and displacement during wartime.
summary.zh: 聚焦战争时期生存、劳动与流离失所经验的木刻作品。

summary.en: A wartime woodcut capturing displacement and the instability of rural society.

summary.en: Landscape-oriented works reflecting memory, poetry, place, and emotional attachment to homeland.
summary.zh: 以风景、记忆、诗意与故乡情感为主题的作品。

summary.en: Historical portraits documenting different stages of Gu Yuan’s life and artistic career.
summary.zh: 记录古元人生与艺术阶段的历史肖像档案。

summary.en: Family photographs, memories, contributors, and intergenerational cultural continuity connected to Gu Yuan’s legacy.
summary.zh: 与古元艺术遗产相关的家族照片、记忆、贡献者与跨代文化传承。

summary.en: One of Gu Yuan’s most internationally recognized woodcuts, representing collective struggle and modern Chinese printmaking.
summary.zh: 古元最具国际代表性的木刻之一，体现现代中国版画中的集体经验与历史张力。

summary.en: A landmark work of Yan’an woodcut culture and one of the defining works of modern Chinese printmaking.
summary.zh: 延安木刻文化的重要代表作，也是中国现代版画史上的经典作品。

summary.en: A socially important woodcut exploring legal reform, gender, and village society.
summary.zh: 探讨法律、女性与乡村社会的重要木刻作品。

summary.en: A major rural labor scene demonstrating Gu Yuan’s mature visual composition and observation of movement.
summary.zh: 展现古元成熟构图与劳动场景观察的重要作品。

summary.en: A widely recognized work reflecting wartime village life and human relationships.
summary.zh: 反映战时乡村生活与人物关系的重要作品。

summary.en: One of Gu Yuan’s most celebrated later-period color woodcuts known for poetic composition and lyrical atmosphere.
summary.zh: 古元后期最著名的套色木刻之一，以诗意构图与抒情氛围著称。

summary.zh: 以现代文学经典人物为基础的心理性木刻肖像作品。

summary.en: A major historical woodcut documenting social transformation and land reform.
summary.zh: 记录社会变迁与土地改革的重要历史木刻。

summary.en: A landscape work important for understanding symbolic representations of Yan’an in visual culture.
summary.zh: 对理解延安视觉文化中的象征性风景表达具有研究意义。

summary.en: A visual example of wartime literacy and educational graphic culture.
summary.zh: 战时识字运动与教育图像文化的重要视觉案例。

title.en: The Carved Memory of Modern China
title.zh: 中国现代记忆的木刻史诗

summary.en: A permanent digital exhibition introducing Gu Yuan’s major works and their role in modern Chinese visual culture.
summary.zh: 介绍古元重要作品及其在中国现代视觉文化中意义的常设数字展览。

summary.en: A thematic exhibition focusing on Gu Yuan’s earliest wartime woodcuts created around 1939–1940.
summary.zh: 聚焦1939至1940年前后古元早期战时木刻作品的专题展览。

summary.en: An exhibition exploring Gu Yuan’s Yan’an-period visual language and rural wartime experience.
summary.zh: 探索古元延安时期视觉语言与乡村战争经验的研究型展览。

summary.zh: 展示与古元艺术遗产相关的家族照片、口述历史与跨代文化延续的数字档案展览。

summary.zh: 这件代表作品常与古元的历史记忆与文化视觉表达联系在一起。

summary.en: A late work dedicated to Gu Yuan’s hometown, reflecting memory, landscape, and return.
summary.zh: 古元晚年献给故乡的重要作品，体现记忆、风景与回归主题。

summary.en: A woodcut portrait based on the literary figure Xianglin Sao, reflecting Gu Yuan’s interest in psychological expression and social realism.
summary.zh: 根据文学人物“祥林嫂”创作的木刻肖像，体现古元对人物心理与现实主义表达的关注。

summary.en: An early expressive portrait study using strong black-and-white contrast and simplified composition.
summary.zh: 早期表现性人物木刻习作，以强烈黑白对比与简化构图形成视觉张力。

title.en: Japanese Agents Forcing Villagers to Join Puppet Army
title.zh: 夺取私人物品参加伪军

summary.en: Early anti-war woodcut depicting forced participation under wartime occupation.
summary.zh: 反映战争时期强迫民众参与伪军的早期木刻作品。

summary.en: A wartime woodcut related to civilian resistance and conflict during Japanese occupation.
summary.zh: 与战争时期民众反抗与冲突相关的木刻作品。

summary.en: A socially engaged woodcut focused on labor, agriculture, and wartime rural life.
summary.zh: 关注劳动、农业与战时乡村生活的社会性木刻作品。

summary.en: A dramatic wartime scene reflecting violence and civilian suffering.
summary.zh: 描绘战争暴力与平民苦难的戏剧性场景。

summary.en: A woodcut focusing on survival, labor, and displacement during wartime.
summary.zh: 聚焦战争时期生存、劳动与流离失所经验的木刻作品。

summary.en: A wartime woodcut capturing displacement and the instability of rural society.
summary.zh: 反映战争时期乡村社会动荡与流亡经验的木刻作品。

title.zh: 八一三日寇开始进攻上海

summary.en: A historical wartime print referencing the Japanese attack on Shanghai.
summary.zh: 以日军进攻上海为主题的历史性战时木刻作品。

summary.en: A small-format folk-inspired print combining decorative symbolism and simplified carving language.
summary.zh: 一件融合民间装饰性语言与简化刀法的小幅木刻作品。

summary.zh: 体现古元对印刷文化与图像符号兴趣的藏书票作品。

summary.en: A personal ex libris using animal imagery and simplified folk-inspired composition.

summary.en: A reflective landscape work revisiting Yan’an through memory and visual atmosphere.
summary.zh: 通过风景与视觉氛围重新回望延安记忆的作品。

summary.zh: 古元最具代表性的作品之一，以强烈视觉对比表现战争中的集体行动与渡河场景。

summary.en: A woodcut depicting rural cooperative organization through simplified folk-inspired imagery.

summary.en: Late-life portrait of Gu Yuan reflecting his senior years and artistic legacy.

summary.en: Folk-style New Year print using traditional auspicious imagery.

summary.en: Wartime refugee scene focusing on family displacement and hardship.
summary.zh: 描绘战争时期家庭流离失所与苦难的木刻作品。

summary.en: Industrial-themed woodcut focusing on labor and machinery.
summary.zh: 以工业劳动与机械生产为主题的木刻作品。

summary.zh: 使用延安视觉语言描绘乡村讲述与讨论场景。

summary.zh: 古元相关展览或学术活动中的发言现场。

summary.en: Landscape-oriented works reflecting memory, poetry, place, and emotional attachment to homeland.
summary.zh: 以风景、记忆、诗意与故乡情感为主题的作品。

summary.en: Historical portraits documenting different stages of Gu Yuan’s life and artistic career.
summary.zh: 记录古元人生与艺术阶段的历史肖像档案。

summary.en: Exhibition photos, museum activities, lectures, and public engagement related to Gu Yuan’s legacy.

summary.en: Family photographs, memories, contributors, and intergenerational cultural continuity connected to Gu Yuan’s legacy.
summary.zh: 与古元艺术遗产相关的家族照片、记忆、贡献者与跨代文化传承。

summary.en: One of Gu Yuan’s most internationally recognized woodcuts, representing collective struggle and modern Chinese printmaking.
summary.zh: 古元最具国际代表性的木刻之一，体现现代中国版画中的集体经验与历史张力。

summary.en: A landmark work of Yan’an woodcut culture and one of the defining works of modern Chinese printmaking.
summary.zh: 延安木刻文化的重要代表作，也是中国现代版画史上的经典作品。

summary.en: A socially important woodcut exploring legal reform, gender, and village society.
summary.zh: 探讨法律、女性与乡村社会的重要木刻作品。

summary.en: A major rural labor scene demonstrating Gu Yuan’s mature visual composition and observation of movement.
summary.zh: 展现古元成熟构图与劳动场景观察的重要作品。

summary.en: A widely recognized work reflecting wartime village life and human relationships.
summary.zh: 反映战时乡村生活与人物关系的重要作品。

summary.en: One of Gu Yuan’s most celebrated later-period color woodcuts known for poetic composition and lyrical atmosphere.
summary.zh: 古元后期最著名的套色木刻之一，以诗意构图与抒情氛围著称。

summary.zh: 以现代文学经典人物为基础的心理性木刻肖像作品。

summary.en: A major historical woodcut documenting social transformation and land reform.
summary.zh: 记录社会变迁与土地改革的重要历史木刻。

summary.en: A landscape work important for understanding symbolic representations of Yan’an in visual culture.
summary.zh: 对理解延安视觉文化中的象征性风景表达具有研究意义。

summary.en: A visual example of wartime literacy and educational graphic culture.
summary.zh: 战时识字运动与教育图像文化的重要视觉案例。

title.en: The Carved Memory of Modern China
title.zh: 中国现代记忆的木刻史诗

summary.en: A permanent digital exhibition introducing Gu Yuan’s major works and their role in modern Chinese visual culture.
summary.zh: 介绍古元重要作品及其在中国现代视觉文化中意义的常设数字展览。

summary.en: A thematic exhibition focusing on Gu Yuan’s earliest wartime woodcuts created around 1939–1940.
summary.zh: 聚焦1939至1940年前后古元早期战时木刻作品的专题展览。

summary.en: An exhibition exploring Gu Yuan’s Yan’an-period visual language and rural wartime experience.
summary.zh: 探索古元延安时期视觉语言与乡村战争经验的研究型展览。

summary.en: A study exhibition examining Gu Yuan’s adaptation of folk art, New Year prints, and popular visual traditions.
summary.zh: 研究古元如何吸收民间艺术、年画与大众视觉传统的专题展览。

summary.en: A poetic exhibition exploring Gu Yuan’s landscape works and later reflections on place and memory.
summary.zh: 探索古元风景作品与晚年记忆表达的诗意展览。

summary.en: A digital archive exhibition presenting family photographs, memories, oral history, and intergenerational continuity connected to Gu Yuan’s legacy.
summary.zh: 展示与古元艺术遗产相关的家族照片、口述历史与跨代文化延续的数字档案展览。

summary.zh: 探讨古元对当代版画、视觉文化与年轻艺术家的影响。

summary.en: A presentation of the ongoing digital preservation, translation, archive organization, and international research efforts related to Gu Yuan’s legacy.

summary.zh: 研究延安时期视觉语言、乡村图像与战争表达。

summary.en: Exploration of how woodcut prints documented war, displacement, and civilian experience.
summary.zh: 探讨木刻如何记录战争、流亡与平民经验。

summary.en: Study of Gu Yuan’s adaptation of folk visual traditions and New Year print aesthetics.
summary.zh: 研究古元如何吸收民间视觉传统与年画美学。
